evals.prompt: Generate Kubernetes manifests for our NestJS API. Need: Deployment (3 replicas, resource limits, probes), Service (ClusterIP), Ingress (with TLS and rate limiting), HPA (scale on CPU 70%), and ConfigMap for non-secret env vars.
evals.expected_output: K8s manifests for Deployment, Service, Ingress, HPA, ConfigMap with all specified features

assertions.name: deployment_manifest
assertions.description: Deployment with 3 replicas, resource requests/limits, all 3 probe types

assertions.name: service_manifest
assertions.description: ClusterIP Service on correct port

assertions.name: ingress_with_tls
assertions.description: Ingress with TLS termination and rate-limiting annotations

assertions.name: hpa_manifest
assertions.description: HPA targeting 70% CPU with scaleDown stabilization

assertions.name: configmap
assertions.description: ConfigMap with non-secret environment variables

evals.prompt: Create a Helm chart for our microservices app. We have 3 services (user, order, product) that share a PostgreSQL database. Need values.yaml with overrides per service, and a shared template for Deployment + Service.
evals.expected_output: Helm chart with shared templates, per-service values, and dependency management

assertions.name: chart_structure
assertions.description: Chart.yaml, values.yaml, templates/ directory structure

assertions.name: shared_templates
assertions.description: Reusable Deployment and Service templates

assertions.name: per_service_values
assertions.description: Values overrides for each of the 3 services

assertions.name: database_dependency
assertions.description: PostgreSQL as a chart dependency or external service

assertions.name: helm_helpers
assertions.description: Named templates (_helpers.tpl) for common labels and selectors

evals.prompt: Our pods keep getting OOMKilled. Current memory limit is 256Mi but the NestJS app sometimes spikes to 400Mi under load. Help configure proper resource limits and add a memory-based HPA.
evals.expected_output: Updated resource limits, memory-based HPA, and guidance on right-sizing

assertions.name: increased_limits
assertions.description: Memory limit increased above 400Mi spike

assertions.name: request_vs_limit
assertions.description: Request set lower than limit with explanation of the difference

assertions.name: memory_hpa
assertions.description: HPA configured to scale on memory usage

assertions.name: right_sizing_guidance
assertions.description: Explains how to monitor and right-size resources

assertions.name: startup_probe
assertions.description: Startup probe added if NestJS has slow initialization

evals.prompt: Set up Kustomize overlays for dev, staging, and production environments. Dev should use 1 replica with debug logging, staging 2 replicas, production 3 replicas with PDB. All share the same base manifests.
evals.expected_output: Kustomize base + 3 overlays with appropriate per-environment configuration

assertions.name: base_directory
assertions.description: Base kustomization with shared Deployment, Service, etc.

assertions.name: three_overlays
assertions.description: dev/, staging/, prod/ overlay directories

assertions.name: replica_scaling
assertions.description: 1/2/3 replicas for dev/staging/prod respectively

assertions.name: pdb_in_prod
assertions.description: PodDisruptionBudget only in production overlay

assertions.name: debug_in_dev
assertions.description: Debug logging environment variable in dev overlay

evals.prompt: Generate manifests for a CronJob that runs database backups nightly, a Job that runs database migrations on deploy, and a Secret for database credentials using sealed-secrets.
evals.expected_output: CronJob for backups, Job for migrations, SealedSecret for credentials

assertions.name: cronjob_manifest
assertions.description: CronJob with nightly schedule for database backup

assertions.name: migration_job
assertions.description: Job that runs database migrations

assertions.name: sealed_secret
assertions.description: SealedSecret for database credentials (not plaintext Secret)

assertions.name: job_completion
assertions.description: Migration job has backoffLimit and completions configured

assertions.name: backup_retention
assertions.description: CronJob has successfulJobsHistoryLimit for cleanup
